description: Detects cloud region configurations that place data outside India — relevant for DPDP cross-border transfer and RBI payment data localization

patterns.name: Non-India AWS region
patterns.description: AWS region code that is NOT ap-south-1 (Mumbai) or ap-south-2 (Hyderabad). Non-India regions trigger DPDP cross-border disclosure and RBI payment localization obligations.
patterns.note: Check if the region is used for payment data or log storage — those have stricter localization requirements.

patterns.name: Non-India GCP region
patterns.description: GCP region that is NOT asia-south1 (Mumbai) or asia-south2 (Delhi). Same implications as DRES-01.

patterns.name: Non-India Azure region
patterns.description: Azure region that is NOT 'Central India', 'South India', 'West India', 'jioindiacentral', or 'jioindiawest'.

patterns.name: Explicit non-India data storage comment/config
patterns.description: Configuration value or comment explicitly naming a non-India location for data storage.
